title: stelis humboldtina
intro: Stelis humboldtina, also known as "Coral Root" or "Coral Pink", is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America and the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis humboldtina include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis humboldtina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
